title: error after build --prod angular
author: conhuhien
body: When I build no prod, It works, but After i build prod, have error when I load website . error "Super expression must either be null or a function"

comments.author: Subhajitdas298
comments.body: Can you share how you cinfigured?

comments.author: conhuhien
comments.body: in tsconfig,json, I add  "exceljs": [ "node_modules/exceljs/dist/exceljs.min" ] in paths, I use @type/node 14.0.13 and exceljs 4.0.1

comments.author: edwinsp94
comments.body: Two months ago I tried to use ExcelJS in my Angular project, it seemed to me an excellent library, everything works fine but it has a problem when building with "ng build --prod" it does not work, I read in several Issues with the same problem but nobody had the solution and it is because the .min does not recognize it. I would appreciate @Subhajitdas298  to provide us with a repository with an example of how you configured it and what version of node and CLI you used. Thank you.

comments.author: Poccomaxazt
